title: レース疲れ①（レース疲れ）

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
I don't know why, but I've got a MAJOR
hankering for sakura mochi!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
I crave that gentle sweetness that permeates the
mouth and that fragrance that heals the body!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
I was in the middle of my daily Bakushin, so why?
Why is my mind flooded with thoughts of sakura
mochi?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I hear that people crave sweet food when they're
tired. Although she hasn't noticed it herself, it
seems that the fatigue has caught up with her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It might be good to reconsider her race
schedule...
